notes: Sanitized schedule backup. Recreate carefully on new server after paths, credentials, and messaging targets are verified.

jobs.name: gridscale-apa-backup-daily-2357
jobs.description: Backup harian GridScale X APA setiap hari pukul 23:57 WIB dan kirim laporan ke dua group Telegram + grup WhatsApp Engineering TDI.
restoreNotes: Verify T: destination path exists and is writable.
Run script manually once before enabling schedule.

jobs.name: timesheet-dashboard-current-month-mondays
jobs.description: Generate dashboard timesheet report untuk bulan berjalan setiap hari Senin dan kirim HTML standar ke Telegram group Command Center.
restoreNotes: Restore Google service account key outside GitHub backup.
Run fetch and generate manually once before enabling schedule.

jobs.name: Weekly TDI website health + certificate monitor
jobs.description: Cek mingguan website TDI www.twinkdigital.co.id setiap Jumat jam 12:00 WIB; laporkan hasil aman/error/certificate expired ke grup Agent AI Command Center.

jobs.name: Timesheet report H-5 akhir bulan ke Agent AI Command Center
jobs.description: Setiap jam 09:00 WIB tanggal 23-26, agent mengecek apakah hari itu H-5 akhir bulan; jika ya, mengirim report timesheet HTML ke group.
restoreNotes: This job intentionally runs on dates 23-26 and checks H-5 logic inside the agent prompt.

jobs.name: weekly-satpamtdi-github-backup
jobs.description: Backup mingguan workspace continuity, workflows, dan schedule Satpam TDI ke GitHub repo SADIC3737/SatpamTDI setiap Sabtu 20:30 WIB.
